templates.name: iRacing Default Helmet
templates.notes: Standard iRacing helmet template with 7 UV zones. Spec map governs metallic/roughness/clearcoat. Visor is a separate UV island and supports chrome/mirror finishes.

templates.name: iRacing HD Helmet (2048)
templates.notes: Higher-resolution helmet template for premium displays. 4x texel density vs default. Same UV layout plus an optional neck skirt zone.

templates.name: Open-Face Classic Helmet
templates.notes: Vintage open-face helmet template (no visor zone). Used for historic/oval and vintage road series.

templates.name: Full-Face Aero Helmet
templates.notes: Modern full-face aerodynamic shell with explicit duct UVs and tearoff lane on the visor. Recommended for premium open-wheel paints.

templates.name: SPB Native Helmet 2K
templates.notes: SPB-native helmet template optimized for our zone editor. Adds a dedicated name_strip zone for driver name placement and an interior zone for liner tints.

uv_zone_descriptions.top: Crown of the helmet, most visible from above
uv_zone_descriptions.left: Left side panel, sponsor placement zone
uv_zone_descriptions.right: Right side panel, sponsor placement zone
uv_zone_descriptions.back: Rear panel, often used for driver name or country flag
uv_zone_descriptions.tearoff_strip: Aerodynamic tearoff lane across visor edge
